libraries.name: MDS - Minima Development System
libraries.description: The core JavaScript library for building MiniDApps. Provides a full API to interact with your Minima node, manage tokens, sign transactions, and communicate over Maxima.

libraries.name: minima.js
libraries.description: Lightweight JavaScript client library for connecting to and interacting with a Minima node from web applications.

libraries.name: minima4j
libraries.description: Java client library for building server-side integrations with the Minima node RPC API.
